name: Battlin' Boxer Shadow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＫ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バーニングナックラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> シャドー
desc: During your Main Phase: You can detach 1 material from a "Battlin' Boxer" Xyz Monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Battlin' Boxer Shadow" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can detach 1 material from a "Battlin' Boxer" Xyz Monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Battlin' Boxer Shadow" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can detach 1 material from a "Battlin' Boxer" Xyz Monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Battlin' Boxer Shadow" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
